# ATT — Attention / first-frame salience

Genus: **Salientia**

Whether the video earns the right to be watched.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H007 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h007-result-frame-beats | B. First frame and scroll stop | Result-first frame beats context-first frame. | CTV | M-MPT |
| H008 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h008-before-after-split | B. First frame and scroll stop | Before/after split beats talking-head open for tutorial content. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H009 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h009-early-face-improves | B. First frame and scroll stop | Early face improves trust for small creators. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H010 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h010-moderate-face-presence | B. First frame and scroll stop | Moderate face presence beats face-only content. | RET | M-MPT |
| H011 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h011-motion-reduces-static | B. First frame and scroll stop | Motion in the first 0.5s reduces static-feed blindness. | CTV | M-MPT |
| H012 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h012-visible-mistake-problem | B. First frame and scroll stop | Visible mistake/problem beats abstract claim. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H013 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h013-data-proof-screenshot | B. First frame and scroll stop | Data/proof screenshot improves authority but may reduce mass appeal. | SAV | M-MPT |
| H014 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h014-frame-clutter-increases | B. First frame and scroll stop | First-frame clutter increases skips. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H091 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h091-show-payoff-visually | Attention scarcity | Videos that show the payoff visually in the first frame outperform videos that explain the payoff verbally. | CTV | M-MPT |
| H092 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h092-frames-dominant-subject | Attention scarcity | First frames with one dominant subject beat cluttered frames for cold-audience discovery. | CTV | M-MPT |
| H142 | *Salientia facialis* var. h142-early-face-plus | Face as anchor | Early face plus proof inserts beats full talking-head for creator education. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H147 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h147-distinctive-frames-increase | Distinctiveness | Distinctive first frames increase memory but not necessarily saves unless the video delivers utility. | RET | M-MPT |
| H214 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h214-process-stop-scroll | Behind-the-scenes / process | Process videos stop scroll better when the final output is previewed first. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H277 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h277-frame-clarity-larger | Viewed vs swiped | First-frame clarity has a larger effect on viewed-vs-swiped than final CTA choice. | CTV | M-MPT |
| H278 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h278-motion-half-improves | Viewed vs swiped | Motion in the first half-second improves stop-scroll only when the subject is clear. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H279 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h279-visible-result-beats | Viewed vs swiped | A visible result beats a promise-only first frame for practical content. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H316 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h316-best-frame-shows | First frame | The best first frame shows either result, problem, proof or identity; generic context loses. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H317 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h317-frames-labelled-contrast | First frame | First frames with labelled contrast outperform single-state frames for before/after content. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H321 | *Salientia uncus* var. h321-result-hooks-work | Hook | Result-first hooks work best when the result is visually shown, not just claimed. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H328 | *Salientia facialis* var. h328-unknown-creators-benefit | Face | Unknown creators benefit from early face presence if followed by proof quickly. | EHR | M-MPT |
| H376 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h376-property-stop-scroll | Real estate / property | Property videos stop scroll with the strongest room/feature, not the front door. | MIX | M-MPT |
| H408 | *Salientia primafacialis* var. h408-reusing-body-different | Variant design | Reusing the same body with different first frames is the fastest way to test scroll-stop. | MIX | M-MPT |
